# thoth_billing_artifacts (Data Source)

Reads monthly billing artifacts (PDF/CSV links) for recent billing periods.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of monthly artifact rows to return.

### Read-Only

- `artifacts_json` (String) Monthly artifact rows as JSON array.
- `total_count` (Number) Total artifact rows returned.
- `response_json` (String) Full billing artifacts response payload as JSON.
